IscsiTargetCommonParams.iops: Default value for the internal LUN rate limiting of the Target; limits the total IOPS of the LUN to below the configured value
IscsiTargetCommonParams.initiator_chaps: Configuration for the initiator side in one-way or mutual CHAP authentication. Specifies the username and password for each initiator.
IscsiTargetCommonParams.chap_secret: Target CHAP password; 12–16 characters long, consisting only of letters and digits
IscsiTargetCommonParams.chap_name: Target CHAP username; 1–223 characters long, consisting only of letters, digits, hyphens (-), colons (:), and periods (.)
IscsiTargetCommonParams.iqn_whitelist: Allowlist for filtering initiators; can be */* or a comma-separated list of IQNs. Only initiators whose IQN matches a list entry can log in to the target.

IscsiTargetCreationParams.stripe_size: Individual stripe size; 4k ≤ stripe_size ≤ 256k and stripe size must be a power of 2
IscsiTargetCreationParams.stripe_num: Number of extents in a stripe group; valid values are: [1, 2, 4, 8, 16, 32, 64, 128]
IscsiTargetCreationParams.replica_num: Replication factor. Note that the replication factor of a Target and its LUNs are independent. If a LUN does not declare a replication factor, it inherits the Target's replication factor. The replication factor of already-created LUNs is not affected.
IscsiTargetCreationParams.name: Name

CloudInitNetWork.type: Network type. Enumerated values: ipv4, ipv4_dhcp.
CloudInitNetWork.nic_index: Index of the corresponding virtual NIC list; the first NIC starts at 0. Supports up to 16 NICs, with a value range of [0, 15].
CloudInitNetWork.netmask: Subnet mask, valid only when type is not ipv4_dhcp
CloudInitNetWork.ip_address: IPv4 address; valid only when type is not ipv4_dhcp

CloudInitNetWorkRoute.network: Static route network address. If 0.0.0.0 is configured here, the default route will be configured according to user settings with higher priority.
CloudInitNetWorkRoute.netmask: Subnet mask of the static route network address
CloudInitNetWorkRoute.gateway: Gateway address required to access the static route address

TemplateCloudInit.user_data: The cloud-init user-data field provided by the user. Base64-encoded content is not supported and the value must not exceed 32KiB.
TemplateCloudInit.public_keys: List of public keys set for the cloud-init default user; a maximum of 10 public keys are allowed
TemplateCloudInit.hostname: Host name. Windows host names can only contain letters (a-z, A-Z), digits (0-9), and hyphens (-), and cannot contain spaces or periods (.). They also cannot consist entirely of digits. On Linux, the host name can be specified as an FQDN.
TemplateCloudInit.networks: List of NIC network configuration information
TemplateCloudInit.nameservers: List of name server addresses; a maximum of 3 name servers are allowed
TemplateCloudInit.default_user_password: Password set for the cloud-init default user. Defaults to the Admin user on Windows and the root user on Linux.

VlanMapping.src_vlan_local_id: Local ID of the source VLAN
VlanMapping.dest_vlan_local_id: Local ID of the VLAN mapped to the target cluster

MigrateVmConfig.delete_src_vm: Whether to retain the source virtual machine. Defaults to retained. When the migration method is live migration, the source virtual machine is never retained.

VmMigrateAcrossClusterParams.where: Select virtual machines to be migrated

StopVmInCutoverMigrationParams.force: Whether to forcibly shut down the source virtual machine. Forcibly shutting down a virtual machine may cause anomalies. Defaults to non-forced shutdown.
StopVmInCutoverMigrationParams.tasks: Staged migration task pending source virtual machine shutdown

AbortMigrateVmAcrossClusterParams.tasks: Cross-cluster migration task to be terminated

VmCreateVmFromContentLibraryTemplatePara.cloud_init: Configure cloud_init for the new virtual machine
VmCreateVmFromContentLibraryTemplatePara.is_full_copy: Whether to perform a full copy
VmCreateVmFromContentLibraryTemplatePara.vcpu: Total number of CPU cores for the new virtual machine. If left blank, it will be automatically derived based on the values of cpu_sockets and cpu_cores, as well as the original template.
VmCreateVmFromContentLibraryTemplatePara.status: Determines whether to power on the new virtual machine immediately after creation. Leave empty to keep it powered off.
VmCreateVmFromContentLibraryTemplatePara.firmware: Configure the firmware type for the new virtual machine. If left empty, the original template's setting will be reused.
VmCreateVmFromContentLibraryTemplatePara.ha: Whether to enable high availability (HA). If left blank, the setting from the original template will be used.
VmCreateVmFromContentLibraryTemplatePara.vm_nics: Configure the NIC for the new virtual machine. If left empty, it will be created according to the original template. If the NIC in the original template does not belong to the current cluster, the default NIC of the current cluster will be used.
VmCreateVmFromContentLibraryTemplatePara.disk_operate: Specifies how the virtual disks of a new virtual machine are modified from the original template, including mount, delete, and modify operations. Leave empty to create based on the original disk; CD-ROM will be ignored.
VmCreateVmFromContentLibraryTemplatePara.memory: Memory size of the new virtual machine in bytes. If left blank, the size from the original template will be used.
VmCreateVmFromContentLibraryTemplatePara.cpu_cores: Number of CPU cores per socket for the new virtual machine. If left blank, it will be automatically derived based on the values of cpu_sockets and vcpu, as well as the original template.
VmCreateVmFromContentLibraryTemplatePara.cpu_sockets: Number of CPU sockets for the new virtual machine. If left blank, it will be automatically derived based on the values of cpu_cores and vcpu, as well as the original template.
VmCreateVmFromContentLibraryTemplatePara.guest_os_type: Guest OS type for the new virtual machine
VmCreateVmFromContentLibraryTemplatePara.folder_id: The new virtual machine will be created in the specified VM group.
VmCreateVmFromContentLibraryTemplatePara.description: Description of the new virtual machine
VmCreateVmFromContentLibraryTemplatePara.name: Name of the new virtual machine
VmCreateVmFromContentLibraryTemplatePara.host_id: Create on the specified host. Leave empty for automatic scheduling.
VmCreateVmFromContentLibraryTemplatePara.max_bandwidth_unit: Specifies the unit for the provided max_bandwidth

VmVolumeType.enum:
* KVM_VOLUME: Normal volume 
* KVM_VOLUME_ISCSI: ISCSI vm volume

VmVolumeRebuildParams.description: Description of the rebuilt virtual volume
VmVolumeRebuildParams.volume_snapshot_id: Unique identifier of the virtual volume snapshot used to rebuild the virtual volume
